testcase.name: testSessionCompressionWithPreviousAgents

error.message: could not execute statement [ERROR: insert or update on table "modules" violates foreign key constraint "modules_project_id_fkey" Detail: Key (project_id)=(106f6485-7ace-4228-917a-96d58f8c9fcf) is not present in table "projects".] [insert into modules (created_at,current_agent,description,name,parsed_stories,project_id,raw_requirement,req_file_path,status,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)]; SQL [insert into modules (created_at,current_agent,description,name,parsed_stories,project_id,raw_requirement,req_file_path,status,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)]; constraint [modules_project_id_fkey]

testcase.system-err: WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\Placeholder\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.14.16\byte-buddy-agent-1.14.16.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: testChatSummarization

failure.message: Expecting actual: "LLM summarization failed" to contain: ["login", "JWT", "authentication"] but could not find: ["login", "JWT", "authentication"]

testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError:
Expecting actual: "LLM summarization failed" to contain: ["login", "JWT", "authentication"] but could not find: ["login", "JWT", "authentication"]

testcase.name: testSessionContextToSystemPrompt

failure.message:
Expecting actual: "## Agent: dev
## Completed Work (Structured Facts) {deliverables=[{name=requirements}]}
## Session Summary PM completed scope definition
## Design Decisions & Trade-offs Chose REST over GraphQL for simplicity
## Recent Activity ```plaintext Last user message ``` " to contain: "## Current Agent: dev"
